api.password.mixedCase: Use a mix of uppercase and lowercase letters
api.password.specialChar: Include at least one special character

api.auth.passwordResetRequired: System has been upgraded, please reset your password
api.auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect attempts, account locked for 15 minutes
api.scan.dirNotAllowed: This directory is not allowed to be scanned
api.fs.mntNotAllowed: Browsing /mnt (Windows drives) is not allowed in remote access mode
api.fs.dirNotAllowed: This directory is not allowed to be accessed

⚠️ File too large ({size} MB), only showing first 10,000 lines. Please open in a local editor.

api.file.typeNotEditable: This file type cannot be edited
api.file.sensitiveNotEditable: This file cannot be edited (sensitive file)
api.file.externalModified: File has been externally modified, refresh and retry
api.ai.notConfigured: Please configure Base URL and API Token first
api.ai.notConfiguredMessage: Please configure the AI model and API Token in settings first
api.ai.tokenInvalid: Token contains invalid characters, please re-enter and save
api.translate.notInstalled: Translation engine not installed. Install: doc77 i translate
api.translate.modelNotReady: Translation model not downloaded or download failed. Run doc77 vendor-install --translate en-zh or click download in the settings panel. If the network is blocked, try using the domestic mirror.
api.auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
api.auth.passwordAlreadySet: Password already set, please use the change password function
api.auth.confirmRequired: Please provide confirm: "yes-i-know" in the request body to confirm the operation
api.auth.passwordRequiredForReset: A password is currently set, please provide the password field
api.auth.securityCleared: All security settings cleared. Encrypted configuration (AI Token, etc.) is no longer valid
ai.context.writeToolsUnavailable: Error: Write operations are not available (requires @doc77/mcp module)
ai.context.dirEmpty: Directory "{dirPath}" is empty or does not exist
ai.context.rateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later
ai.context.fileDirective: Below is the full content of document "{file}". Please answer directly based on it without calling any tools:
ai.runtime.riskLevelDenied: Error: Current risk level "{riskLevel}" does not allow {opType} operation. Please increase ai.risk_level in settings and try again.
ai.runtime.sensitiveRejected: Error: Path "{filePath}" points to a sensitive file, rejected.
ai.runtime.queuedForApproval: [Pending approval] Queued for approval, task ID: {taskId} ({desc}). Go to the Approvals tab to approve or reject; will not execute until approved.
mcp.param.operations: Array of operations, each element contains type and corresponding parameters
mcp.tool.listFiles.desc: List files and folders in the specified path, including name/type/size/modified. Sensitive files are filtered by default.
mcp.tool.readFile.desc: Read file content (only within registered projects; sensitive files are automatically rejected)
mcp.tool.getFileInfo.desc: Get file metadata (size, modification time, type)
mcp.tool.writeFile.desc: Create or overwrite file content (requires approval)
mcp.tool.moveFile.desc: Move or rename a file (requires approval)
mcp.tool.deleteFile.desc: Delete a file or empty folder (requires mandatory approval)
mcp.tool.batchOperations.desc: Execute multiple operations in batch (approve as a whole, atomic rollback)
mcp.tool.getTaskStatus.desc: Query the status of a previously submitted write task
